TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_masalu, title = masalu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/masalu} }

S.FORM: a tja siaya a masalu tua tja kinasaluan. masalu , masalu , katua masalu maljimalji == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: a ʦa siaja a masaɭu tua ʦa kinasaɭuan. masaɭu , masaɭu , katua masaɭu maʎimaʎi == kaizuan ==

S.PHON: a ʦa siaja a masaɭu tua ʦa kinasaɭuan. masaɭu , masaɭu , katua masaɭu maʎimaʎi == kaizuan ==
